chapter_title.ar: باب مِيرَاثِ الْأَبَوَيْنِ مَعَ الْإِخْوَةِ وَ الْأَخَوَاتِ لِأَبٍ وَ الْإِخْوَةِ وَ الْأَخَوَاتِ لِأُمٍّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 14 – Inheritance of the two parents with the brothers and sisters of the father, and the brothers and sisters of the mother

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/141)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/141)
text: لَا تَحْجُبُ الْأُمَّ عَنِ الثُّلُثِ إِلَّا أَخَوَانِ أَوْ أَرْبَعُ أَخَوَاتٍ لِأَبٍ وَ أُمٍّ أَوْ لِأَبٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazal, from Abdullah Bin Bukeyr, from Fazal Abu Al Abbas Al Baqbaaq,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The mother is not barred from the third except (if there are) two brothers, or four sisters of the father and mother, or of the father’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from ‘Abd Allah ibn Bukayr from Fadl abu al-‘Abbas al-Baqbaq who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A mother is not barred from receiving one-third except because of two brothers or four sisters from both parents.”’
